subcodes.first_line: Mayest thou, by the grace of God, in all times and seasons abide beneath the shade of the All-Merciful's mercy, and find rest from the world and its peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رس انشاء الله در جمیع احیان و اوان در ظل رحمت رحمن مستریح باشی و از عالم و عالمیان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @growth of the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
